name: @singularity/plugin-primitives-collab-doc
description: Domain-agnostic headless bridge between a Lexical editor state and the Y.Doc representation @lexical/yjs binds to (yDocFromLexical / readYDoc / yDocContent), plus the bytea column type for persisted doc state. A leaf so content-model owners (e.g. the page editor's runs↔XmlText seam) compose it without this primitive knowing any content model.
